start.text: That was too close out there. Skiff like that shouldn't have gotten inside our turn.

choices.text: I wasn't going to let them touch you.

mutations.text: The captain put the ship between me and the skiff's last volley. Took hull damage for it. They meant it.

choices.text: Next time, you fly and I'll shoot.

bravado_reply.prompt_hint: The captain shrugs off the pirate ambush with bravado. Respond as yourself: dry, guarded, a pilot who counts every hit the hull takes. Let a little relief show through.

gratitude_reply.prompt_hint: The captain says they deliberately took a hit to shield you during the ambush. This matters to you more than you want to show — people covering for you is rare since Earth. Respond briefly, guarded but genuinely moved.

deflect_reply.text: You'd shoot the stars and bill me for the ammunition. I'll keep the stick.

closing.text: Buy me one at the bar and we'll call the ledger even. I'm going to go check what that volley did to my engines.

choices.text: Ledger's never even with you, Tib.
